common.tagline: Your AI agent team. Your accounts, your budget, your call.
error.generic: Oops, something went wrong. Try again in a moment.
email.magicLink.subject: Your Atelier sign-in link
email.magicLink.intro: Hi! Here is your link to sign in to Atelier:
email.magicLink.expiry: This link expires in 5 minutes. If you didn't request it, just ignore this email.
login.title: Good to see you again
login.subtitle: Sign in to get back to your team.
login.googleUnavailable: Google sign-in coming soon — use the magic link meanwhile.
login.linkSent: Sent! Open your inbox and click the link to sign in.
login.error: We couldn't send the link. Check the address and try again.
app.title: Your ventures
app.empty: No venture yet. Describe your idea, your team handles the rest.
app.form.name: Venture name
app.form.pitch: Your idea in a few lines
app.form.error: Creation failed. Check the fields and try again.
onboarding.title: Your team is getting to work
onboarding.subtitle: The Researcher studies your market, the CEO drafts your plan. Takes 2-3 minutes.
onboarding.done: Ready! Your plan and backlog are waiting.
chat.title: Chat with your CEO
chat.placeholder: Ask a question, request a mission…
chat.empty: Say hi to your CEO: they already know your plan and memory.
missions.title: Missions
missions.subtitle: Every mission shows its real cost. Irreversible actions go through your approval queue.
missions.empty: No missions yet — onboarding creates your backlog.
actions.title: Approval queue
actions.subtitle: Nothing goes out without your call — this is EXACTLY what will run.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Your accounts, your assets: Atelier builds and publishes ON your services, never in your place.
settings.github.help: Token (repo scope) + target repo "owner/name" where the Builder pushes your landing.
settings.vercel.help: Vercel token: automatic previews, production after your approval.
settings.buffer.help: Facebook/LinkedIn/X publishing via your Buffer account — coming soon. Meanwhile every approved post is ready to copy-paste.
cockpit.terminalIdle: your team is ready — run a mission to watch it work
cockpit.noSite: No website yet — ask the CEO for a landing or run the Builder mission.
cockpit.chatHint: They know your plan, memory and budget.
